31806.title: Laffer's Day in Court: The Revenue Effects of Criminal Justice Fees and Fines
31806.zh_title: 拉弗曲线在法庭上：刑事司法费用和罚款的收入效应
31806.abstract: Many jurisdictions levy sizable fines and fees (legal financial obligations, or LFOs) on criminal defendants. Proponents argue LFOs are a “tax on crime” that funds courts and provides deterrence; opponents argue they do neither. We examine the fiscal implications of lowering LFOs. Incentives to default generate a “Laffer” curve with revenue eventually decreasing in LFOs. Using detailed administrative data, however, we find few defendants demonstrably on the right-hand side of the curve. Those who are tend to be poor, Black, and charged with felonies. As a result, decreasing LFOs for the average defendant would come at substantial cost to governments.
31806.zh_abstract: 许多司法管辖区对刑事被告征收高额罚款和费用。支持者认为这些费用是对犯罪的征税，为法院提供资金并起到威慑作用；反对者则认为两者都未实现。我们研究了降低这些费用的财政影响。违约激励产生了一条“拉弗”曲线，收入最终随费用增加而减少。然而，利用详细的行政数据，我们发现很少有被告明显处于曲线的右侧。那些处于右侧的往往是穷人、黑人以及被指控犯有重罪的人。因此，对普通被告降低费用将给政府带来巨大成本。

31805.title: Racial Disparities in the Income Tax Treatment of Marriage
31805.zh_title: 婚姻所得税处理中的种族差异
31805.authors: Janet Holtzblatt, Swati Joshi, Nora R. Cahill, William Gale
31805.abstract: Although it is generally blind with respect to race, the federal individual income tax can create racial disparities when factors that affect tax liability are associated with race. We provide new evidence on racial differences in marriage penalties and bonuses in the income tax, using data from eight waves of the Survey of Consumer Finances. Our results support Brown’s (2021) hypothesis that, controlling for income, penalties are more frequent and larger for Black couples than white couples. We link these results to racial differences in relative spousal earnings, the presence of dependents, and the level of income. We show that marriage rates are much higher among white adults than Black adults, which implies that two policy reforms we examine end up benefiting a greater share of white adults than Black adults.
31805.zh_abstract: 尽管联邦个人所得税通常不考虑种族因素，但当影响纳税义务的因素与种族相关时，它可能产生种族差异。我们利用消费者金融调查的八轮数据，提供了关于所得税中婚姻惩罚和奖励存在种族差异的新证据。我们的结果支持布朗的假设，即在控制收入的情况下，黑人夫妇比白人夫妇更频繁地面临更大规模的婚姻惩罚。我们将这些结果与配偶相对收入、受抚养人存在以及收入水平方面的种族差异联系起来。我们表明，白人成年人的结婚率远高于黑人成年人，这意味着我们考察的两项政策改革最终惠及的白人成年人比例高于黑人成年人。

31804.title: The Effects of Mandatory Profit-Sharing on Workers and Firms: Evidence from France
31804.zh_title: 强制性利润分享对工人和企业的影响：来自法国的证据
31804.authors: Elio Nimier-David, David Sraer, David Thesmar
31804.abstract: Since 1967, all French firms with more than 100 employees have been required to share a fraction of their excess profits with their employees. Through this scheme, firms with excess profits distribute, on average, 10.5% of their pre-tax income to workers. In 1990, the eligibility threshold was reduced to 50 employees. We exploit this regulatory change to identify the effects of mandated profit-sharing on firms and their employees. The cost of mandated profit-sharing for firms is evident in the significant bunching at the 100-employee threshold observed prior to the reform, which completely disappears post-reform. Using a difference-in-difference strategy, we find that, at the firm level, mandated profit-sharing (a) increases the labor share by 1.8 percentage points, (b) reduces the profit share by 1.4 percentage points, and (c) has no significant effect on investment and productivity. At the employee level, mandated profit-sharing increases low-skill workers’ total compensation and leaves high-skill workers’ total compensation unchanged. Overall, mandated profit-sharing redistributes excess profits to lower-skill workers in the firm without generating significant distortions or productivity effects.
31804.zh_abstract: 自1967年以来，所有员工超过100人的法国企业都被要求将其超额利润的一部分与员工分享。通过这一机制，拥有超额利润的企业平均将其税前收入的10.5%分配给工人。1990年，适用门槛降至50名员工。我们利用这一监管变化来识别强制性利润分享对企业及其员工的影响。强制性利润分享对企业的成本在改革前观察到的100名员工门槛处的显著聚集现象中显而易见，而这一现象在改革后完全消失。采用双重差分策略，我们发现，在企业层面，强制性利润分享（a）使劳动收入份额增加1.8个百分点，（b）使利润份额减少1.4个百分点，（c）对投资和生产率没有显著影响。在员工层面，强制性利润分享增加了低技能工人的总报酬，而对高技能工人的总报酬没有影响。总体而言，强制性利润分享将超额利润重新分配给企业中的低技能工人，而不会产生显著的扭曲或生产率效应。
31804.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PE, PR；JEL：G3, H20, J01, J30

31803.title: An Economic View of Corporate Social Impact
31803.zh_title: 企业社会影响的经济学视角
31803.authors: Hunt Allcott, Giovanni Montanari, Bora Ozaltun, Brandon Tan
31803.abstract: The growing discussions of impact investing and stakeholder capitalism have increased interest in measuring companies’ social impact. We conceptualize corporate social impact as the welfare loss that would be caused by a firm’s exit. To illustrate, we quantify the social impacts of 74 firms in 12 industries using a new survey measuring consumer and worker substitution patterns combined with models of product and labor markets. We find that consumer surplus is the primary component of social impact (dwarfing profits, worker surplus, and externalities), suggesting that consumer impacts deserve more attention from impact investors. Existing ESG and social impact ratings are essentially unrelated to our economically grounded measures.
31803.zh_abstract: 关于影响力投资和利益相关者资本主义的讨论日益增多，这提高了衡量企业社会影响的兴趣。我们将企业社会影响概念化为企业退出所导致的福利损失。为了说明这一点，我们利用一项衡量消费者和工人替代模式的新调查，结合产品和劳动力市场模型，量化了12个行业中74家企业的社会影响。我们发现，消费者剩余是社会影响的主要组成部分（远超利润、工人剩余和外部性），这表明消费者影响值得影响力投资者更多关注。现有的ESG和社会影响评级与我们基于经济学的衡量标准基本无关。
31803.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, IO；JEL：D6, J23, L13, L62, L66, L71, L81, L93, M14, Q54

31802.title: Double and Single Descent in Causal Inference with an Application to High-Dimensional Synthetic Control
31802.zh_title: 因果推断中的双重下降与单一下降：以高维合成控制法为例
31802.authors: Jann Spiess, Guido Imbens, Amar Venugopal
31802.abstract: Motivated by a recent literature on the double-descent phenomenon in machine learning, we consider highly over-parameterized models in causal inference, including synthetic control with many control units. In such models, there may be so many free parameters that the model fits the training data perfectly. We first investigate high-dimensional linear regression for imputing wage data and estimating average treatment effects, where we find that models with many more covariates than sample size can outperform simple ones. We then document the performance of high-dimensional synthetic control estimators with many control units. We find that adding control units can help improve imputation performance even beyond the point where the pre-treatment fit is perfect. We provide a unified theoretical perspective on the performance of these high-dimensional models. Specifically, we show that more complex models can be interpreted as model-averaging estimators over simpler ones, which we link to an improvement in average performance. This perspective yields concrete insights into the use of synthetic control when control units are many relative to the number of pre-treatment periods.
31802.zh_abstract: 受近期关于机器学习中双重下降现象文献的启发，我们考虑了因果推断中高度过参数化的模型，包括包含许多对照单元的合成控制法。在此类模型中，自由参数可能过多，以至于模型能完美拟合训练数据。我们首先研究了用于插补工资数据和估计平均处理效应的高维线性回归，发现协变量数量远多于样本量的模型可以优于简单模型。然后，我们记录了包含许多对照单元的高维合成控制估计量的表现。我们发现，即使在预处理拟合达到完美之后，添加对照单元仍有助于提高插补性能。我们为这些高维模型的性能提供了一个统一的理论视角。具体而言，我们表明，更复杂的模型可以解释为对更简单模型的模型平均估计量，我们将其与平均性能的改善联系起来。这一视角为在对照单元数量相对于预处理期数量较多时使用合成控制法提供了具体见解。

31801.title: Does Paid Sick Leave Facilitate Reproductive Choice?
31801.zh_title: 带薪病假是否促进了生育选择？
31801.authors: Johanna Catherine Maclean, Alberto Ortega, Ioana Popovici, Christopher J. Ruhm
31801.abstract: The U.S. does not have a federal paid sick leave (PSL) policy; however, multiple states have adopted PSL mandates which compel employers to provide employees with, on average, seven days of PSL per year. PSL can facilitate healthcare use among women of child-bearing ages, including use of family planning services. We combine administrative, health insurance claims, and survey data with difference-in-differences methods to shed light on these possibilities. Our findings indicate that state PSL mandates reduce birth rates, potentially through increased use of contraceptive services, and changes in employment and marital status post-mandate.
31801.zh_abstract: 美国没有联邦层面的带薪病假政策；然而，多个州已通过带薪病假强制令，要求雇主每年为员工提供平均七天的带薪病假。带薪病假可以促进育龄女性使用医疗服务，包括计划生育服务。我们结合行政数据、健康保险索赔数据和调查数据，采用双重差分方法来阐明这些可能性。我们的研究结果表明，州级带薪病假强制令降低了生育率，这可能是通过增加避孕服务的使用以及强制令实施后就业和婚姻状况的变化来实现的。

31800.title: Pension Reform, Incentives to Retire and Retirement Behavior: Empirical Evidence from Swedish Micro-data
31800.zh_title: 养老金改革、退休激励与退休行为：来自瑞典微观数据的经验证据
31800.abstract: This paper investigates to what extent the 1998 reform of Sweden’s public old-age pension system contributed to the increase in extensive margin labor supply among older workers seen in the country in recent decades. We use a large data set containing all males and females born in Sweden between 1927 and 1950 and observe their retirement behavior during 1991–2012. The data show that the reform changed the incentives to remain in the labor force ambiguously: although it induced an income effect towards later retirement through lower replacement levels, it also implied a lower price on leaving the labor market under some assumptions. We use an econometric model in which the economic incentives to stay in the labor market are measured by Social Security Wealth, defined at each hypothetical retirement age, and a variable measuring the implicit tax, imposed by the income security system, on staying in the labor force. The point estimates from our econometric model, which should be interpreted with caution, suggest that at most a small part of the increase in labor force participation of the elderly can be attributed to the pension reform.
31800.zh_abstract: 本文研究了瑞典1998年公共养老金制度改革在多大程度上导致了近几十年来该国老年工人广泛边际劳动供给的增加。我们使用一个包含1927年至1950年间在瑞典出生的所有男性和女性的大型数据集，观察他们在1991年至2012年间的退休行为。数据显示，改革以模糊的方式改变了留在劳动力市场的激励：虽然它通过降低替代率产生了延迟退休的收入效应，但在某些假设下，它也意味着降低了离开劳动力市场的代价。我们使用一个计量经济学模型，其中留在劳动力市场的经济激励由社会保障财富（在每个假设的退休年龄定义）和一个衡量收入保障体系对留在劳动力市场施加的隐性税收的变量来衡量。我们计量模型得出的点估计（应谨慎解释）表明，老年人劳动参与率的增加最多只有一小部分可归因于养老金改革。

31820.title: Hidden Exposure: Measuring US Supply Chain Reliance
31820.zh_title: 隐性暴露：衡量美国供应链依赖度
31820.authors: Richard Baldwin, Rebecca Freeman, Angelos Theodorakopoulos
31820.abstract: Supply chain problems, previously relegated to specialized journals, now appear in G7 Leaders’ Communiqués. Our paper looks at three core elements of the problems: measurement of the links that expose supply chains to disruptions, the nature of the shocks that cause the disruptions, and the criteria for policy to mitigate the impact of disruptions. Utilizing global input-output data, we show that US exposure to foreign suppliers, and particularly to China, is ‘hidden’ in the sense that it is much larger than what conventional trade data suggest. However, at the macro level, exposure remains relatively modest, given that over 80% of US industrial inputs are sourced domestically. We argue that many recent shocks to supply chains have been systemic rather than idiosyncratic. Moreover, systemic shocks are likely to arise from climate change, geoeconomic tensions, and digital disruptions. Our principal conclusion is that concerns regarding supply chain disruptions, and policies to address them, should focus on individual products, rather than the whole manufacturing sector.
31820.zh_abstract: 供应链问题此前仅见于专业期刊，如今已出现在七国集团领导人公报中。本文研究了该问题的三个核心要素：衡量使供应链面临中断风险的关联环节、导致中断的冲击性质、以及缓解中断影响的政策标准。利用全球投入产出数据，我们发现美国对外国供应商（尤其是中国）的暴露程度是“隐性”的，即远大于传统贸易数据所显示的水平。然而，在宏观层面，由于美国超过80%的工业投入来自国内，这种暴露程度仍然相对温和。我们认为，近期许多供应链冲击是系统性而非特异性的。此外，系统性冲击可能源于气候变化、地缘经济紧张和数字颠覆。我们的主要结论是，对供应链中断的担忧及应对政策应聚焦于单个产品，而非整个制造业部门。

31819.title: Social Insurance and Migration: Evidence from a Nation-Wide Institutional Reform in China
31819.zh_title: 社会保险与迁移：来自中国全国性制度改革的证据
31819.authors: Fanghua Li, Chenyang Ji, Moshe Buchinsky
31819.abstract: In this paper we examine the causal relationship between formal social insurance and individuals’ migration decisions. We exploit a quasi experimental design in rural China, under which county officials were assigned to a group of villages (i.e., treated villages) to serve as village supervisors (VSs) for the local leaders. We show that this led to reduced favoritism in welfare allocation by the local leaders, thereby increasing the efficacy in the formal social insurance in the treated villages. We use detailed geo-referenced administrative household-level data suited for a spatial regression discontinuity design (RDD) to obtain an average treatment effect (LATE) of the improved social insurance on migration. The apparent variation in the implementation of the reform across treated villages and heterogeneous impacts on different family clans make it possible to directly link changes in the efficacy of the insurance to migration choices. We find a large positive migration effect, of about 19%, for the young males and females. In turn, this led to a large boost in the average household’s income in just two years.
31819.zh_abstract: 本文考察了正式社会保险与个人迁移决策之间的因果关系。我们利用中国农村的一项准实验设计，在该设计中，县级官员被指派到一组村庄（即处理村）担任当地领导人的村务监督员。我们表明，这减少了当地领导人在福利分配中的偏袒行为，从而提高了处理村正式社会保险的效能。我们使用适合空间断点回归设计的详细地理参考行政家庭层面数据，获得了改善后的社会保险对迁移的平均处理效应。处理村之间改革实施的明显差异以及不同家族受到的异质性影响，使得我们能够直接将保险效能的改变与迁移选择联系起来。我们发现，对年轻男性和女性而言，迁移效应显著为正，约为19%。反过来，这仅在两年内就大幅提升了家庭平均收入。

31818.title: Does Wage Theft Vary by Demographic Group? Evidence from Minimum Wage Increases
31818.zh_title: 工资盗窃是否因人口群体而异？来自最低工资上涨的证据
31818.abstract: Using Current Population Survey data, we assess whether and to what extent the burden of wage theft — wage payments below the statutory minimum wage — falls disproportionately on various demographic groups following minimum wage increases. For most racial and ethnic groups at most ages we find that underpayment rises similarly as a fraction of realized wage gains in the wake of minimum wage increases. We also present evidence that the burden of underpayment falls disproportionately on relatively young African American workers and that underpayment increases more for Hispanic workers among the full working-age population.
31818.zh_abstract: 利用当前人口调查数据，我们评估了在最低工资上涨后，工资盗窃（即低于法定最低工资的工资支付）的负担是否以及在多大程度上不成比例地落在不同人口群体身上。对于大多数种族和族裔群体及大多数年龄段，我们发现，在最低工资上涨后，工资支付不足作为已实现工资增长的一部分，其上升幅度相似。我们还提供了证据表明，工资支付不足的负担不成比例地落在相对年轻的非裔美国工人身上，并且在全部劳动年龄人口中，西班牙裔工人的工资支付不足增加得更多。
31818.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：J08, J21, J38, K42

31817.title: Semiparametric Conditional Factor Models: Estimation and Inference
31817.zh_title: 半参数条件因子模型：估计与推断
31817.authors: Qihui Chen, Nikolai Roussanov, Xiaoliang Wang
31817.abstract: This paper introduces a simple and tractable sieve estimation of semiparametric conditional factor models with latent factors. We establish large-N-asymptotic properties of the estimators without requiring large T. We also develop a simple bootstrap procedure for conducting inference about the conditional pricing errors as well as the shapes of the factor loading functions. These results enable us to estimate conditional factor structure of a large set of individual assets by utilizing arbitrary nonlinear functions of a number of characteristics without the need to pre-specify the factors, while allowing us to disentangle the characteristics' role in capturing factor betas from alphas (i.e., undiversifiable risk from mispricing). We apply these methods to the cross-section of individual U.S. stock returns and find strong evidence of large nonzero pricing errors that combine to produce arbitrage portfolios with Sharpe ratios above 3. We also document a significant decline in apparent mispricing over time.
31817.zh_abstract: 本文引入了一种简单且易于处理的筛分估计方法，用于具有潜在因子的半参数条件因子模型。我们在不需要大T的情况下建立了估计量的大N渐近性质。我们还开发了一种简单的自助法程序，用于对条件定价误差以及因子载荷函数的形状进行推断。这些结果使我们能够利用多个特征的任意非线性函数来估计大量单个资产的条件因子结构，而无需预先指定因子，同时允许我们区分特征在捕捉因子贝塔与阿尔法（即不可分散风险与错误定价）中的作用。我们将这些方法应用于美国个股收益的横截面数据，并发现了大量非零定价误差的有力证据，这些误差组合起来产生了夏普比率超过3的套利组合。我们还记录了明显的错误定价随时间显著下降的现象。
31817.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, IO, LS；JEL：G1, G14, G17

31816.title: How Does Medicaid Expansion Impact Income Support Program Participation and Employment for Different Types of People with Disabilities?
31816.zh_title: 医疗补助扩展如何影响不同类型残疾人的收入支持计划参与和就业？
31816.abstract: Social Security Disability Insurance and Supplemental Security Income, the United States’ two primary disability income support programs, each offer a pathway to public health insurance in addition to cash benefits. This implies that expansions in public health insurance availability, such as the ACA’s Medicaid expansions, may impact disability program participation and employment of people with disabilities. However, prior research has yielded mixed results as to the impact of Medicaid expansion on these outcomes. Using a stacked difference-in-differences design and data from the Current Population Survey, we demonstrate that the ACA’s Medicaid expansions increased SSDI receipt among individuals ages 50-64 with physical, self-care and independent living disabilities, consistent with a “job unlock” mechanism. Exploiting the longitudinal nature of the CPS, we show that treatment effects are heterogeneous and concentrated among persons with ongoing disabilities (as opposed to new disabilities) as reported on the CPS’s 6-question functional impairment sequence. We also show suggestive evidence of a reduction in SSI, but find that it is sensitive to specification and data preparation choices, which we illustrate through comparison with other recent work. Effects on employment are inconclusive. Our findings provide further evidence of work capacity among SSDI beneficiaries.
31816.zh_abstract: 社会保障残疾保险和补充保障收入是美国两个主要的残疾收入支持计划，除了现金福利外，每个计划都提供了一条获得公共医疗保险的途径。这意味着公共医疗保险可及性的扩展，例如《平价医疗法案》的医疗补助扩展，可能会影响残疾人的残疾计划参与和就业。然而，先前关于医疗补助扩展对这些结果影响的研究得出了不同的结论。利用堆叠双重差分法和当前人口调查数据，我们证明《平价医疗法案》的医疗补助扩展增加了50-64岁有身体、自理和独立生活障碍的个体获得社会保障残疾保险的比例，这与“工作解锁”机制一致。利用当前人口调查的纵向性质，我们表明处理效应是异质性的，并且集中在当前人口调查的6项功能性损伤序列中报告的持续性残疾（而非新发残疾）个体中。我们还展示了补充保障收入减少的提示性证据，但发现该结果对模型设定和数据准备选择敏感，我们通过与近期其他研究的比较来说明这一点。对就业的影响尚无定论。我们的发现为社会保障残疾保险受益人的工作能力提供了进一步证据。

31815.title: Economic Growth under Transformative AI
31815.zh_title: 变革性人工智能下的经济增长
31815.abstract: Recent advances in AI may herald the near arrival of systems that can automate essentially all work. We review the macroeconomic implications of this scenario, in a framework synthesizing several strands of the relevant literature. Robustly, fully automating production alone (so that machines can self-replicate) would dramatically raise the growth rate and lower the labor share, breaking the Kaldor Facts that have long characterized frontier growth. Automating R&D (so that machines can self-improve) would accelerate the transformation, but may not produce it in isolation. Wages—the product of exploding output and a plummeting labor share—may rise or fall, depending on the returns to scale, the importance of natural resources, and the direction of technical change.
31815.zh_abstract: 人工智能的最新进展可能预示着能够自动化几乎所有工作的系统即将到来。我们在一个综合了相关文献多个分支的框架中，回顾了这一情景的宏观经济影响。稳健地看，仅完全自动化生产（使机器能够自我复制）将大幅提高增长率并降低劳动份额，打破长期刻画前沿增长的卡尔多事实。自动化研发（使机器能够自我改进）将加速这一转变，但单独来看可能不会产生这种转变。工资——作为爆炸性产出与骤降劳动份额的乘积——可能上升或下降，这取决于规模报酬、自然资源的重要性以及技术变革的方向。
31815.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, LS, PR；JEL：E2, O3, O4

31814.title: Analyzing Bounded Count Data
31814.abstract: This paper presents and assesses analytical strategies that respect the bounded count structures of outcomes that are encountered often in health and other applications. The paper's main motivation is that the applied econometrics literature lacks a comprehensive discussion and critique of strategies for analyzing and understand such data. The paper's goal is to provide a treatment of prominent issues arising in such analyses, with particular focus on evaluations in which bounded count outcomes are of interest, and on econometric modeling of their probability and moment structures. Hopefully the paper will provide a toolkit for researchers so they may better appreciate the range of questions that might be asked of such data and the merits and limitations of the analytical methods they might contemplate to study them. It will be seen that the choice of analytical method is often consequential: questions of interest may be unanswerable when some familiar analytical methods are deployed in some circumstances.
31814.zh_abstract: 本文提出并评估了尊重健康及其他应用中常见结果的有界计数结构的分析策略。本文的主要动机是，应用计量经济学文献缺乏对分析和理解此类数据策略的全面讨论与批判。本文的目标是处理此类分析中出现的突出问题，特别关注以有界计数结果为评估对象的情况，以及对其概率和矩结构的计量经济学建模。希望本文能为研究人员提供一个工具包，使他们能够更好地理解可能从这类数据中提出的各种问题，以及他们可能考虑用于研究这些问题的分析方法的优点和局限性。可以看出，分析方法的选择往往至关重要：在某些情况下，当使用一些熟悉的分析方法时，感兴趣的问题可能无法得到解答。

31813.title: Dirty Air and Green Investments: The Impact of Pollution Information on Portfolio Allocations
31813.zh_title: 脏空气与绿色投资：污染信息对投资组合配置的影响
31813.authors: Raymond Fisman, Pulak Ghosh, Arkodipta Sarkar, Jian Zhang
31813.abstract: We study exposure to pollution information and investment portfolio allocations, exploiting the rollout of air quality monitoring stations in India. Using a triple-differences framework, we show that retail investors' investments in "brown" stocks are negatively related to local air pollution after a monitoring station appears nearby, with particularly pronounced effects on ``alert'' dates when air quality is listed as harmful to the general population. The effect of pollution information on investment choices is most prominent amongst tech-savvy investors who are most plausibly "treated" by real-time pollution data, and by younger investors who tend to be more sensitive to environmental concerns. Overall, our results provide micro-level support for the view that salience of environmental conditions affect investors' tastes for green investments, and preferences for environmental amenities more generally.
31813.zh_abstract: 我们研究了污染信息暴露与投资组合配置之间的关系，利用了印度空气质量监测站的推广。通过三重差分框架，我们表明，在监测站附近出现后，散户投资者对“棕色”股票的投资与当地空气污染呈负相关，在空气质量被列为对普通人群有害的“警报”日期，这种效应尤为显著。污染信息对投资选择的影响在精通技术的投资者中最为突出，他们最有可能受到实时污染数据的“处理”，并且在往往对环境问题更敏感的年轻投资者中也更为显著。总体而言，我们的结果为以下观点提供了微观层面的支持：环境条件的显著性会影响投资者对绿色投资的偏好，以及更广泛地对环境舒适度的偏好。

31812.title: The Impact of the Global COVID-19 Vaccination Campaign on All-Cause Mortality
31812.zh_title: 全球新冠疫苗接种运动对全因死亡率的影响
31812.authors: Virat Agrawal, Neeraj Sood, Christopher M. Whaley
31812.abstract: The global COVID-19 vaccination campaign is the largest public health campaign in history, with over 2 billion people fully vaccinated within the first 8 months. Nevertheless, the impact of this campaign on all-cause mortality is not well understood. Leveraging the staggered rollout of vaccines, we find that the vaccination campaign across 141 countries averted 2.4 million excess deaths, valued at $\$6.5$ trillion. We also find that an equitable counterfactual distribution of vaccines, with vaccination in each country proportional to its population, would have saved roughly 670,000 more lives. However, this distribution approach would have reduced the total value of averted deaths by $\$1.8$ trillion due to redistribution of vaccines from high-income to low-income countries.
31812.zh_abstract: 全球新冠疫苗接种运动是历史上规模最大的公共卫生运动，在最初8个月内就有超过20亿人完成全程接种。然而，该运动对全因死亡率的影响尚不明确。利用疫苗分阶段推出的特点，我们发现141个国家的疫苗接种运动避免了240万例超额死亡，价值6.5万亿美元。我们还发现，如果按照公平的反事实分配方式，即每个国家的疫苗接种量与其人口成比例，本可多挽救约67万人的生命。然而，由于疫苗从高收入国家重新分配至低收入国家，这种分配方式会使避免死亡的总价值减少1.8万亿美元。

31811.title: Wars and the Labor Market Outcomes of Minorities in the U.S.
31811.zh_title: 战争与美国少数族裔的劳动力市场结果
31811.abstract: This chapter reviews key literature studying the effects of wars on minority and underrepresented groups in U.S. labor markets in the 20th century. These labor markets, characterized by historically pervasive barriers to entry into certain occupations and industries, promotions, and fair pay for underrepresented workers, experienced severe challenges during times of war. These challenges served to break down some of the barriers faced by underrepresented workers. Recent years have shown that sudden labor shortages, similar to those induced by large-scale wars, are not a feature of the past. Hence, a better understanding of such shortages and their effects on different groups continues to be important. The focus here is on the labor market outcomes of Black and white women, as well as Black men, during and after the two World Wars. Their labor inputs compensated for the lack of white male workers during the war years; however, only WWII generated significant and more prolonged socioeconomic progress for both groups. This chapter summarizes theoretical considerations that can explain why some war-induced labor market shocks are persistent while others are not, and the empirical literature related to the labor market experiences of women and Black workers during and after the World Wars.
31811.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了研究20世纪战争对美国劳动力市场中少数族裔和弱势群体影响的关键文献。这些劳动力市场历来以某些职业和行业的进入壁垒、晋升障碍以及弱势工人薪酬不公为特征，在战争时期经历了严峻挑战。这些挑战有助于打破弱势工人面临的部分障碍。近年来的情况表明，类似于大规模战争所引发的突然劳动力短缺并非过去独有的特征。因此，更好地理解此类短缺及其对不同群体的影响仍然至关重要。本章重点关注两次世界大战期间及之后黑人和白人女性以及黑人男性的劳动力市场结果。他们的劳动投入弥补了战争期间白人男性工人的短缺；然而，只有第二次世界大战为这两个群体带来了显著且更持久的社会经济进步。本章总结了可以解释为何某些战争引发的劳动力市场冲击具有持续性而其他则没有的理论思考，以及与世界大战期间和之后女性和黑人工人劳动力市场经历相关的实证文献。

31810.title: Heterogeneous Agent Trade
31810.abstract: This paper studies the implications of household heterogeneity for trade. I develop a model where household heterogeneity is induced via incomplete markets and results in heterogeneous price elasticities. Conditional on exposure to trade, heterogeneous price elasticities imply that different households value price changes differently, and thus rich and poor households experience different gains from trade. I calibrate the model to match bilateral trade flows and micro-facts about household-level expenditure patterns and elasticities. I find gains from trade that are pro-poor and that the average gains from trade are substantially larger than representative agent benchmarks.
31810.zh_abstract: 本文研究了家庭异质性对贸易的影响。我构建了一个模型，其中家庭异质性由不完全市场引发，并导致异质的价格弹性。在面临贸易敞口的情况下，异质的价格弹性意味着不同家庭对价格变化的估值不同，因此富裕家庭和贫困家庭从贸易中获得的收益也不同。我校准该模型以匹配双边贸易流以及家庭层面支出模式和弹性的微观事实。我发现贸易收益有利于穷人，并且平均贸易收益远大于代表性代理人基准下的结果。
31810.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：D31, E2, F1, F4

31809.title: China’s Nationwide CO2 Emissions Trading System: A General Equilibrium Assessment
31809.zh_title: 中国全国性二氧化碳排放交易体系：一般均衡评估
31809.authors: Lawrence H. Goulder, Xianling Long, Chenfei Qu, Da Zhang
31809.abstract: China’s recently launched CO2 emissions trading system, already the world’s largest, aims to contribute importantly toward global reductions in greenhouse gas emissions. The system, a tradable performance standard (TPS), differs importantly from cap and trade (C&T), the principal emissions trading approach used in other countries. This paper presents the structure and results from a multi-sector, multi-period equilibrium model tailored to evaluate China’s TPS. The model incorporates distinctive features of China’s economy, including state-owned enterprises and electricity market regulation. It distinguishes between the TPS and C&T and considers a wide range of potential future TPS designs.\nKey findings include the following. The TPS’s environmental benefits exceed its costs by a factor of five when only the climate-related benefits are considered and by a significantly higher factor when health benefits from improved air quality are included. The TPS’s interactions with China’s fiscal system substantially affect its costs relative to those of C&T. Employing a single benchmark (standard) for the electricity sector would lower costs by 34 percent relative to the four-benchmark system that is actually in place but increase the standard deviation of percentage income losses across provinces by more than 60 percent. Introducing an auction as a complementary source of allowance supply can lower economy-wide costs by at least 30 percent.
31809.zh_abstract: 中国最近启动的二氧化碳排放交易体系，已是全球规模最大的此类体系，旨在为全球温室气体减排做出重要贡献。该体系是一种可交易绩效标准，与世界上其他国家主要采用的排放交易方法——总量控制与交易——有重要区别。本文介绍了一个为评估中国可交易绩效标准而量身定制的多部门、多时期均衡模型的结构和结果。该模型纳入了中国经济的独特特征，包括国有企业和电力市场监管。它区分了可交易绩效标准与总量控制与交易，并考虑了未来可交易绩效标准设计的多种可能方案。主要发现包括：仅考虑气候相关效益时，可交易绩效标准的环境效益是其成本的五倍；若纳入空气质量改善带来的健康效益，则倍数显著更高。可交易绩效标准与中国财政体系的相互作用对其相对于总量控制与交易的成本有显著影响。对电力部门采用单一基准，相对于实际运行的四基准体系，可将成本降低34%，但会使各省份收入损失百分比的标准差增加超过60%。引入拍卖作为配额供给的补充来源，可将整个经济体的成本降低至少30%。
31809.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：D58, D61, H23, Q52, Q54, Q58

31808.title: Using Macro Counterfactuals to Assess Plausibility: An Illustration using the 2001 Rebate MPCs
31808.zh_title: 利用宏观反事实评估合理性：以2001年退税边际消费倾向为例
31808.authors: Jacob Orchard, Valerie A. Ramey, Johannes Wieland
31808.abstract: Macroeconomics has increasingly adopted tools from the applied micro “credibility revolution” to estimate micro parameters that can inform macro questions. In this paper, we argue that researchers should take advantage of this confluence of micro and macro to take the credibility revolution one step further. We argue that researchers should assess the plausibility of the micro estimates and macro models by constructing macro counterfactuals for historical periods and comparing these counterfactuals with reasonable benchmarks. We illustrate this approach by conducting a case study of the 2001 U.S. tax rebates, as well as briefly summarizing two previous applications of the methodology. In the 2001 rebate case, we calibrate a two-good, two-agent New Keynesian model with the leading estimates of the household marginal propensity to consume (MPC) out of the rebates to construct a counterfactual path for nondurable consumption. The counterfactual path implies that without the tax rebate nondurable consumption spending would have fallen dramatically in the late summer and fall of 2001. Using forecasting regressions and other evidence, we argue that this counterfactual is implausible. When we investigate the source of the discrepancy, we find that the leading MPC estimates are not representative of the response of total consumption.
31808.zh_abstract: 宏观经济学越来越多地采用应用微观“可信性革命”的工具来估计可为宏观问题提供信息的微观参数。在本文中，我们认为研究人员应利用这种微观与宏观的融合，将可信性革命再推进一步。我们认为，研究人员应通过为历史时期构建宏观反事实，并将这些反事实与合理的基准进行比较，来评估微观估计和宏观模型的合理性。我们通过对2001年美国退税进行案例研究来说明这种方法，并简要总结了该方法之前的两次应用。在2001年退税案例中，我们使用关于家庭退税边际消费倾向的主要估计，校准了一个两商品、两代理人的新凯恩斯模型，以构建非耐用品消费的反事实路径。该反事实路径表明，如果没有退税，2001年夏末和秋季的非耐用品消费支出将大幅下降。利用预测回归和其他证据，我们认为这一反事实不合理。当我们调查差异来源时，我们发现主要的边际消费倾向估计并不能代表总消费的反应。

31807.title: When Institutions Interact: How the Effects of Unemployment Insurance are Shaped by Retirement Policies
31807.zh_title: 当制度相互作用时：退休政策如何塑造失业保险的效果
31807.authors: Matthew Gudgeon, Pablo Guzman, Johannes F. Schmieder, Simon Trenkle, Han Ye
31807.abstract: We show that the non-employment effects of unemployment insurance (UI) for older workers depend critically on retirement policy. Using German data, we document large bunching in UI inflows at the age that allows workers to claim their pension following UI expiration. Inflows respond strongly to several UI and pension reforms. We probe the implications of these behavioral responses using a dynamic model and find that Germany’s UI and retirement policy changes had substantial effects on the unemployment rate of older workers. Furthermore, we calculate large fiscal externalities from extending UI for older workers, especially under generous retirement policies.
31807.zh_abstract: 我们表明，失业保险对老年工人的非就业效应关键取决于退休政策。利用德国数据，我们记录了在失业保险到期后可以领取养老金的年龄点上，失业保险流入量出现大量聚集。流入量对多次失业保险和养老金改革反应强烈。我们利用动态模型探究这些行为反应的含义，发现德国的失业保险和退休政策变化对老年工人的失业率产生了实质性影响。此外，我们计算出延长老年工人失业保险会产生巨大的财政外部性，尤其是在慷慨的退休政策下。
31807.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：E24, J2, J26, J6, J63, J64, J65, J68

31841.title: To Go Electric or To Burn Coal? A Randomized Field Experiment of Informational Nudges
31841.zh_title: 用电还是烧煤？信息助推的随机实地实验
31841.authors: Hanming Fang, King King Li, Peiyao Shen
31841.abstract: Coal heating in residential homes is an important source of indoor air pollution, leading to detrimental health effects. We conduct a randomized field experiment in northern China using three types of SMS campaigns targeting three potential biases that may hinder the adoption of electric heating: a Cost SMS campaign, designed to address the overestimation of electricity expenses; a Health SMS campaign, aimed at addressing the underestimation of health damage associated with coal heating; and a Social Comparison SMS campaign, intended to inform households about the popularity of electric heating. We find that the Cost SMS backfires: it instead leads to a substantial reduction in electric heating, which can be attributed to salience bias induced by the Cost SMS, which drew heightened attention to the cost of electricity. The Health SMS is ineffective for households that underestimate the health damage of coal heating and even backfires for those who expressed little concern about the health consequences. Social Comparison SMS is only effective for a small proportion of households who were concerned about their neighbors' heating choices. Overall, our findings suggest that SMS campaigns targeting these biases are largely ineffective, and caution should be exercised when applying plausible nudge interventions. The findings also suggest that households may be motivated to maintain their beliefs and resist paternalistic interventions.
31841.zh_abstract: 住宅燃煤取暖是室内空气污染的重要来源，导致有害的健康影响。我们在中国北方进行了一项随机实地实验，使用三种类型的短信活动，针对可能阻碍采用电取暖的三种潜在偏见：成本短信活动，旨在解决对电费的高估；健康短信活动，旨在解决对燃煤取暖健康危害的低估；以及社会比较短信活动，旨在告知家庭电取暖的普及程度。我们发现成本短信适得其反：它反而导致电取暖大幅减少，这可归因于成本短信引起的显著性偏见，该短信使人们对电费成本更加关注。健康短信对低估燃煤取暖健康危害的家庭无效，甚至对那些对健康后果不太关心的家庭产生反效果。社会比较短信仅对一小部分关心邻居取暖选择的家庭有效。总体而言，我们的发现表明，针对这些偏见的短信活动基本上无效，并且在应用看似合理的助推干预时应谨慎行事。这些发现还表明，家庭可能有动机维持其信念并抵制家长式干预。

31840.title: Foreign Competition and Innovation
31840.abstract: Empirical studies have found that enhanced foreign competition can encourage or discourage innovation. To address this relationship, I examine a market structure in which a small number of large multi-product oligopolists compete with a large number of small single-product firms in the same industry. The single-product firms are short-lived while the multi-product firms live forever, and the large firms invest in innovation in order to enlarge their product spans. All firms export. I show that an increase in the competitiveness of foreign firms can increase or reduce innovation efforts of a large multi-product firm. Moreover, changes in the incentives to innovate can be different for more-productive and less-productive oligopolists. As a result, aggregate sectoral innovation may rise or decline, depending on the productivity distribution of the oligopolists. I also show that changes in short-term operating profits may not be aligned with changes in the incentives to invest in innovation.
31840.zh_abstract: 实证研究发现，增强的外国竞争可以鼓励或抑制创新。为了探讨这一关系，我考察了一种市场结构，其中少数大型多产品寡头与大量小型单一产品企业在同一行业竞争。单一产品企业寿命短暂，而多产品企业永续存在，大型企业投资于创新以扩大其产品范围。所有企业都出口。我表明，外国企业竞争力的增强可以增加或减少大型多产品企业的创新努力。此外，创新激励的变化对于生产率较高和较低的寡头可能不同。因此，总体部门创新可能上升或下降，这取决于寡头的生产率分布。我还表明，短期经营利润的变化可能与创新投资激励的变化不一致。

31839.title: Daily Momentum and New Investors in an Emerging Stock Market
31839.zh_title: 新兴股票市场中的日度动量与新投资者
31839.authors: Zhenyu Gao, Wenxi Jiang, Wei A. Xiong, Wei Xiong
31839.abstract: Despite the dominance of retail investors in the Chinese stock market, there’s a conspicuous absence of price momentum in weekly and monthly returns. This study uncovers the presence of price momentum in daily returns and, through a systematic analysis of trading heterogeneity among investors, links daily momentum to the attention and trading activities of new investors—a phenomenon particularly significant in emerging stock markets. Furthermore, our findings indicate the existence of daily price momentum in various other emerging markets, contrasting with its relative scarcity in developed ones.
31839.zh_abstract: 尽管中国股票市场以散户投资者为主导，但在周度和月度回报中明显缺乏价格动量。本研究揭示了日度回报中存在价格动量，并通过系统分析投资者之间的交易异质性，将日度动量与新投资者的关注和交易活动联系起来——这一现象在新兴股票市场中尤为显著。此外，我们的发现表明，日度价格动量存在于其他各种新兴市场，而在发达市场中则相对稀缺。

31838.title: Fiscal Influences on Inflation in OECD Countries, 2020-2023
31838.abstract: The fiscal theory of the price level (FTPL) has been active for 30 years, and the interest in this theory grew with the recent global surges in inflation and government spending. A related idea from Lucas and Stokey is that inflation during wartime (or an analogous global emergency such as the COVID pandemic) can be an efficient form of state-contingent public finance. This study applies these ideas to the recent inflation in 37 OECD countries. The theory’s centerpiece is the government’s intertemporal budget constraint, which relates a country’s inflation rate in 2020-2023 to a composite government-spending variable. This variable equals the increases in ratios of government expenditure to GDP in 2020 and 2021, divided by the ratio of public debt to GDP in 2019 and the duration of the debt in 2019. The estimated coefficients of this variable are significantly positive, implying that about 80% of effective government financing came from the inverse effect of unexpected inflation on the real value of public debt, whereas only around 20% reflected conventional public finance (increases in current or future taxes or cuts in future spending). Within the Euro area, inflation reacts mostly to the area-wide composite government-spending variable, not to individual values.
31838.zh_abstract: 价格水平的财政理论（FTPL）已活跃30年，随着近期全球通胀和政府支出的激增，对该理论的兴趣也随之增长。Lucas和Stokey的一个相关观点是，战争时期（或类似COVID大流行的全球紧急情况）的通胀可以是一种有效的状态依存公共财政形式。本研究将这些思想应用于37个OECD国家近期的通胀。该理论的核心是政府的跨期预算约束，它将一个国家2020-2023年的通胀率与一个综合政府支出变量联系起来。该变量等于2020年和2021年政府支出占GDP比重的增量，除以2019年公共债务占GDP的比重和2019年债务期限。该变量的估计系数显著为正，表明约80%的有效政府融资来自意外通胀对公共债务实际价值的反向影响，而仅约20%反映了传统公共财政（当前或未来税收的增加或未来支出的削减）。在欧元区内，通胀主要对整个欧元区的综合政府支出变量做出反应，而非个别国家的数值。
31838.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE；JEL：E3, H20, H5, H60

31837.title: The A.I. Dilemma: Growth versus Existential Risk
31837.zh_title: 人工智能的困境：增长与生存风险
31837.abstract: Advances in artificial intelligence (A.I.) are a double-edged sword. On the one hand, they may increase economic growth as A.I. augments our ability to innovate. On the other hand, many experts worry that these advances entail existential risk: creating a superintelligence misaligned with human values could lead to catastrophic outcomes, even possibly human extinction. This paper considers the optimal use of A.I. technology in the presence of these opportunities and risks. Under what conditions should we continue the rapid progress of A.I. and under what conditions should we stop?
31837.zh_abstract: 人工智能的进步是一把双刃剑。一方面，随着人工智能增强我们的创新能力，它可能促进经济增长。另一方面，许多专家担心这些进步会带来生存风险：创造出一个与人类价值观不一致的超级智能可能导致灾难性后果，甚至可能使人类灭绝。本文考虑了在这些机遇与风险并存的情况下人工智能技术的最优使用方式。在什么条件下我们应该继续人工智能的快速发展，在什么条件下我们应该停止？

31836.title: The Impact of Fake Reviews on Demand and Welfare
31836.zh_title: 虚假评论对需求与福利的影响
31836.authors: Jesper Akesson, Robert W. Hahn, Robert D. Metcalfe, Manuel Monti-Nussbaum
31836.abstract: Although fake online customer reviews have become prevalent on platforms such as Amazon, Google, and Facebook, little is known about how these reviews influence consumer behavior. This paper provides the first experimental estimates of the effects of fake reviews on individual demand and welfare. We conduct an incentive-compatible online experiment with a nationally representative sample of respondents from the United Kingdom (n = 10,000). Consumers are asked to choose a product category, browse a platform resembling Amazon, and select one of five equally priced products. One of the products is of inferior quality, one is of superior quality, and three are of average quality. We randomly allocate participants to variants of the platform: five treatment groups see positive fake reviews for an inferior product, and the control group does not see fake reviews. Moreover, some participants are randomly selected to receive an educational intervention that aims to mitigate the potential effects of fake reviews. Our analysis of the experimental data yields four findings. First, fake reviews make consumers more likely to choose lower-quality products. Second, we estimate that welfare losses from such reviews may be important—on the order of $.12 for each dollar spent in the setting we study. Third, we find that fake reviews have heterogeneous effects. For example, the effect of fake reviews is smaller for those who do not trust customer reviews. Fake reviews also have larger effects on those who shop online more frequently. Fourth, we show that the educational intervention reduces the adverse welfare impact of fake reviews by 44%.
31836.zh_abstract: 尽管虚假的在线客户评论在亚马逊、谷歌和Facebook等平台上已变得普遍，但人们对这些评论如何影响消费者行为知之甚少。本文首次提供了虚假评论对个人需求和福利影响的实验估计。我们针对来自英国的全国代表性样本（n=10,000）进行了一项激励相容的在线实验。消费者被要求选择一个产品类别，浏览一个类似亚马逊的平台，并从五个价格相同的产品中选择一个。其中一个产品质量较差，一个质量较好，另外三个质量一般。我们随机将参与者分配到平台的不同变体：五个处理组看到针对劣质产品的正面虚假评论，而对照组则看不到虚假评论。此外，部分参与者被随机选中接受一项旨在减轻虚假评论潜在影响的教育干预。我们对实验数据的分析得出四个发现。首先，虚假评论使消费者更有可能选择质量较低的产品。其次，我们估计此类评论造成的福利损失可能相当大——在我们研究的情境中，每花费一美元大约损失0.12美元。第三，我们发现虚假评论具有异质性效应。例如，对于那些不信任客户评论的人来说，虚假评论的影响较小。虚假评论对更频繁在线购物的人影响也更大。第四，我们表明，教育干预措施将虚假评论的不利福利影响减少了44%。

31835.title: A Tale of Two Fields? STEM Career Outcomes
31835.zh_title: 两个领域的差异？STEM职业成果
31835.authors: Xuan Jiang, Joseph Staudt, Bruce A. Weinberg
31835.abstract: Is the labor market for US researchers experiencing the best or worst of times? This paper analyzes the market for recently minted Ph.D. recipients using supply-and-demand logic and data linking graduate students to their dissertations and W2 tax records. We also construct a new dissertation-industry “relevance” measure, comparing dissertation and patent text and linking patents to assignee firms and industries. We find large disparities across research fields in placement (faculty, postdoc, and industry positions), earnings, and the use of specialized human capital. Thus, it appears to simultaneously be a good time for some fields and a bad time for others.
31835.zh_abstract: 美国研究人员的劳动力市场是处于最好还是最坏的时代？本文运用供需逻辑以及将研究生与其学位论文和W2税务记录联系起来的数据，分析了新近获得博士学位的毕业生市场。我们还构建了一个新的学位论文-行业“相关性”衡量指标，比较学位论文与专利文本，并将专利与受让方公司和行业联系起来。我们发现，不同研究领域在职位安置（教职、博士后和行业职位）、收入以及专业人力资本的运用方面存在巨大差异。因此，对于某些领域来说，这似乎同时是一个好时期，而对其他领域则是一个坏时期。

31834.title: Lagged-Price Reimbursement Contracts: The Impact of Medicare Part B on Pharmaceutical Price Growth
31834.zh_title: 滞后价格报销合同：医疗保险B部分对药品价格增长的影响
31834.authors: Angelique Acquatella, Keith Marzilli Ericson, Amanda Starc
31834.abstract: We examine cost-plus lagged-price reimbursement contracts, focusing on Medicare Part B's payment for physician-administered drugs. Our theoretical model shows that lagged-price reimbursement can raise launch prices but lower prices in later periods. While previous research showed Part B increased launch prices, we estimate its effect on later prices (net of rebates). Drugs more exposed to Medicare have lower price growth. A drug with above median Part B exposure has a 10% lower price after 3 years than a below median exposure drug that launched at the same price, with a larger effect for newly approved molecules.
31834.zh_abstract: 我们研究了成本加成滞后价格报销合同，重点关注医疗保险B部分对医生给药药品的支付。我们的理论模型表明，滞后价格报销可能会提高上市价格，但会降低后期价格。虽然先前的研究表明B部分提高了上市价格，但我们估计了其对后期价格（扣除返利后）的影响。受医疗保险影响更大的药品价格增长较低。与以相同价格上市但受B部分影响低于中位数的药品相比，受B部分影响高于中位数的药品在三年后价格低10%，对于新批准的分子，这一效应更大。

31833.title: Risk Preferences Implied by Synthetic Options
31833.zh_title: 由合成期权隐含的风险偏好
31833.abstract: The historical returns on equity index options are well known to be strikingly negative. That is typically explained either by investors having convex marginal utility over stock returns (e.g. crash/variance aversion) or by intermediaries demanding a premium for hedging risk. This paper examines the consistency of those explanations with returns on dynamically replicated, or synthetic, options. Theoretically, it derives conditions under which convex marginal utility leads synthetic options to also have negative excess returns. Empirically, synthetic options have CAPM alphas near zero over the period 1926--2022, in stark contrast to exchange-traded options. Over the last 15 years, returns on traded options have converged to those on synthetic options -- with the variance risk premium shrinking towards zero -- while various drivers of the cost and risk of hedging options exposures have declined, consistent with a model in which intermediaries drive option prices.
31833.zh_abstract: 众所周知，股票指数期权的历史回报率非常低。这通常被解释为要么投资者对股票回报具有凸边际效用（例如，对崩盘/方差的厌恶），要么中介机构因对冲风险而要求溢价。本文检验了这些解释与动态复制（即合成）期权回报的一致性。理论上，它推导出凸边际效用导致合成期权也具有负超额回报的条件。实证上，在1926年至2022年期间，合成期权的CAPM阿尔法接近于零，这与交易所交易期权形成鲜明对比。在过去15年中，交易期权的回报已收敛于合成期权的回报——方差风险溢价趋近于零——而对冲期权敞口的成本和风险的各项驱动因素均已下降，这与中介机构驱动期权价格的模型一致。

31832.title: Low Risk-Free Rates and Intertemporal Arbitrage
31832.zh_title: 低无风险利率与跨期套利
31832.authors: Marlon Azinovic-Yang, Harold L. Cole, Felix Kubler
31832.abstract: Is deficit finance free when real borrowing rates are routinely lower than growth rates? We study this question in a production-based asset-pricing model that features heterogeneous trading technologies as well as idiosyncratic and aggregate risk and can match the observed low average risk-free rate and the high market price of risk. We use our model to examine under which conditions realistic calibrations allow for (bounded) intertemporal arbitrage, that is to say, the possibility of infinite rollover of a short position. We give examples where this infinite rollover is possible. However, for our benchmark calibration that matches the high market price of risk observed in the data, rollover is impossible even if the average risk-free rate lies 3.5 percent below the average growth rate. The result is robust with respect to the introduction of permanent growth shocks.
31832.zh_abstract: 当实际借贷利率通常低于增长率时，赤字融资是免费的吗？我们在一个基于生产的资产定价模型中研究这个问题，该模型具有异质性交易技术以及特质性和总体风险，并且能够匹配观察到的低平均无风险利率和高市场风险价格。我们使用我们的模型来检验在哪些条件下，现实的校准允许（有界的）跨期套利，即无限滚动空头头寸的可能性。我们给出了这种无限滚动可能存在的例子。然而，对于匹配数据中观察到的高市场风险价格的基准校准，即使平均无风险利率比平均增长率低3.5个百分点，滚动也是不可能的。这一结果对于引入永久性增长冲击是稳健的。

31831.title: Do Water Audits Work?
31831.authors: Jesper Akesson, Robert W. Hahn, Rajat Kochhar, Robert D. Metcalfe
31831.abstract: Water suppliers are showing greater interest in using different mechanisms to promote conservation. One such mechanism is conducting home water audits, which involves assessing water use and providing tailored suggestions for conserving water for residential customers. Yet, very little is known about the economic impacts of these water audits. This paper helps fill this gap by implementing a natural field experiment in the United Kingdom. The experiment involves randomly allocating 45,000 water customers to a control group or to treatment groups that receive different behavioral encouragements to take-up an online water audit. Our analysis yields three main findings. First, encouraging subjects to participate in an audit with financial incentives reduces household consumption by about 17 percent over two months. Furthermore, we find that the size of the financial incentive used to encourage conservation matters for take-up, but not conservation. Second, notwithstanding these improvements in water conservation, the per capita net benefits of the intervention are close to zero under a wide range of assumptions. We also implement a marginal value of public funds approach that considers benefits and costs and we reach a similar conclusion. Third, we find that targeting of high users could double the effectiveness of the financial incentive interventions.
31831.zh_abstract: 供水商对使用不同机制促进节水的兴趣日益浓厚。其中一种机制是进行家庭用水审计，这包括评估用水情况并为居民客户提供量身定制的节水建议。然而，人们对这些用水审计的经济影响知之甚少。本文通过在英国实施一项自然实地实验来帮助填补这一空白。该实验将45,000名用水客户随机分配到对照组或接受不同行为激励以参与在线用水审计的处理组。我们的分析得出三个主要发现。首先，用经济激励鼓励受试者参与审计，使家庭用水量在两个月内减少了约17%。此外，我们发现用于鼓励节水的经济激励的规模会影响参与率，但不影响节水量。其次，尽管节水效果有所改善，但在广泛的假设下，该干预措施的人均净收益接近于零。我们还实施了一种考虑收益和成本的公共资金边际价值方法，并得出了类似的结论。第三，我们发现，针对高用水户可以将经济激励干预措施的有效性提高一倍。

31830.title: Competition, Harmonization and Redistribution: Corporate Taxes in Switzerland
31830.zh_title: 竞争、协调与再分配：瑞士的公司税
31830.authors: Marius Brülhart, Marko Koethenbuerger, Matthias Krapf, Raphael Parchet, Kurt Schmidheiny, David Staubli
31830.abstract: Switzerland could be considered as a test case for international corporate-tax policy coordination. It is a federation of 26 fiscally autonomous cantons that have been taxing corporate profits more or less independently for over a century. We document and discuss corporate taxation in Switzerland, with a focus on three aspects: (a) the evolving within-country geography of taxable profits and corporate tax rates, (b) the nature and historical emergence of formal tax-base harmonization, and (c) the functioning of fiscal equalization. Parallels are drawn and differences are discussed relative to ongoing efforts at international tax coordination.
31830.zh_abstract: 瑞士可以被视为国际公司税收政策协调的试验案例。它是一个由26个财政自治的州组成的联邦，这些州在一个多世纪以来或多或少独立地对公司利润征税。我们记录并讨论了瑞士的公司税收，重点关注三个方面：(a) 国内应税利润和公司税率的演变地理分布，(b) 正式税基协调的性质和历史出现，以及(c) 财政均等化的运作。我们与正在进行的国际税收协调努力进行了类比，并讨论了差异。

31829.title: Long-term Care in Japan
31829.authors: Rong Fu, Toshiaki Iizuka, Haruko Noguchi
31829.abstract: Japan, renowned for its significantly aged population, presents a distinctive landscape in elderly care. Notably, there exists no apparent correlation between the economic well-being of the elderly and the limitations they experience in Activities of Daily Living (ADLs) and Instrumental Activities of Daily Living (IADLs). In response to the escalating demand for elderly care, Japan introduced the public Long-Term Care Insurance (LTCI) system in 2000. This comprehensive program offers a wide spectrum of long-term care services, aiming to facilitate aging in place for seniors and alleviate the burdens on informal caregivers. Nevertheless, the LTCI system faces substantial challenges, predominantly related to financial sustainability and a shortage of human resources. Ongoing discussions center on achieving cost-effective service delivery, potential adjustments to premium rates and copayments, especially for individuals with ample financial resources or minimal care needs. Furthermore, debates surround the reduction of the age of eligibility for LTCI, with opposition stemming from intricate financial and structural considerations. Japan grapples with a deficiency of social security contributors and skilled care workers, necessitating endeavors to enhance labor force participation and foster innovation in the long-term care sector. Japan's LTCI system offers invaluable insights for countries grappling with akin demographic and care-related predicaments.
31829.zh_abstract: 日本以其显著的老龄化人口而闻名，在老年人护理方面呈现出独特的景象。值得注意的是，老年人的经济福祉与他们日常生活活动（ADLs）和工具性日常生活活动（IADLs）所受到的限制之间没有明显的相关性。为了应对日益增长的老年人护理需求，日本于2000年引入了公共长期护理保险（LTCI）体系。这一全面计划提供广泛的长期护理服务，旨在帮助老年人在家中养老，并减轻非正式护理人员的负担。然而，LTCI体系面临重大挑战，主要与财务可持续性和人力资源短缺有关。当前的讨论集中在实现成本效益的服务交付、可能调整保费率和共付额（特别是针对拥有充足财务资源或护理需求极低的个人）上。此外，关于降低LTCI资格年龄的辩论仍在继续，反对意见源于复杂的财务和结构性考量。日本面临社会保障缴费者和熟练护理人员不足的问题，需要努力提高劳动力参与率并促进长期护理领域的创新。日本的LTCI体系为面临类似人口和护理相关困境的国家提供了宝贵的见解。

31828.title: Preemptive Austerity with Rollover Risk
31828.zh_title: 带有展期风险的预防性紧缩
31828.authors: Juan Carlos Conesa, Timothy J. Kehoe
31828.abstract: By preemptive austerity, we mean a policy that increases taxes to deter potential rollover crises. The policy is so successful that the usual danger signal of a rollover crisis, a high yield on new bonds sold, does not show up because the policy eliminates the danger. Mechanically, high taxes make the safe zone in the model — the set of sovereign debt levels for which the government prefers to repay its debt rather than default — larger. By announcing a high tax rate at the beginning of the period, the government ensures that tax revenue will be high enough to service sovereign debt becoming due, which deters panics by international lenders but is ex-post suboptimal. That is why, as it engages in preemptive austerity, the government continues to reduce the level of debt to a point where, asymptotically, high taxes are no longer necessary.
31828.zh_abstract: 所谓预防性紧缩，是指一种通过增税来阻止潜在展期危机的政策。该政策非常成功，以至于展期危机通常的危险信号——新发行债券的高收益率——并未出现，因为该政策消除了危险。从机制上讲，高税收扩大了模型中的安全区域——即政府更倾向于偿还债务而非违约的主权债务水平集合。通过在期初宣布高税率，政府确保税收收入足以偿还到期的主权债务，这阻止了国际贷款人的恐慌，但事后却是次优的。这就是为什么，在实施预防性紧缩时，政府会继续将债务水平降低到某个点，在该点上，高税收最终不再必要。
31828.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, PE；JEL：E6, F3, F4, H2, H3

31827.title: Partisan Traps
31827.authors: Ethan Bueno de Mesquita, Wioletta Dziuda
31827.abstract: Electoral incentives may lead policymakers to eschew opportunities for common-interest reform, focusing instead on zero-sum, partisan policymaking. By forgoing opportunities for common-interest reforms, incumbents may convince their constituents that such reforms are rarely feasible, so that policymaking is primarily about zero-sum, partisan conflict. Voters with such beliefs vote based on ideological alignment, rather than factors such as quality or honesty. This is electorally beneficial for incumbents, who are typically ideologically aligned with their constituents. We capture this logic in an infinite horizon model and characterize the resulting dynamics of politics and policymaking. Equilibrium exhibits partisan traps---voters are pessimistic about common-interest opportunities, politicians behave in a purely partisan manner that shuts down voter learning, and ideologically aligned incumbents are consistently reelected. Partisan traps often occur in equilibrium even when common-interest reforms are in fact frequently feasible. The model shows how elite and mass polarization are intertwined, with politicians engaging in strategically polarized and polarizing behavior which leads to pessimistic beliefs among voters, who come to perceive there to be little political common ground.
31827.zh_abstract: 选举激励可能导致政策制定者回避共同利益改革的机会，转而专注于零和的党派政策制定。通过放弃共同利益改革的机会，现任者可能让其选民相信此类改革很少可行，因此政策制定主要是关于零和的党派冲突。持有这种信念的选民会根据意识形态一致性而非质量或诚实等因素投票。这对现任者在选举上有利，因为他们通常与选民在意识形态上一致。我们在一个无限期界模型中捕捉了这一逻辑，并描述了由此产生的政治和政策制定动态。均衡表现出党派陷阱——选民对共同利益机会持悲观态度，政治家以纯粹的党派方式行事，从而阻止了选民的学习，而意识形态一致的现任者则持续连任。即使共同利益改革实际上经常可行，党派陷阱也常常在均衡中出现。该模型展示了精英和大众极化如何相互交织，政治家采取战略性的极化和极化行为，导致选民产生悲观信念，认为政治中几乎没有共同点。

31826.title: Long-term Care in England
31826.authors: James Banks, Eric French, Jeremy McCauley
31826.abstract: This paper describes the state of Long-Term Care (LTC) in England, which is facing increasing strain due to population aging. We piece together microeconomic and aggregate data in order to give an overview of the demand and supply of LTC in England in a way that facilitates comparisons with other countries, and briefly discuss current LTC policy and recent reforms.
31826.zh_abstract: 本文描述了英格兰长期护理（LTC）的状况，该领域因人口老龄化而面临日益增长的压力。我们整合微观经济和总量数据，以概述英格兰长期护理的需求和供给，从而便于与其他国家进行比较，并简要讨论当前的长期护理政策和近期的改革。

31825.title: Universalizing the Access to Long-term Care: Evidence from Spain
31825.zh_title: 普及长期护理服务：来自西班牙的证据
31825.authors: Joan Costa-Font, Sergi Jimenez-Martin, Cristina Vilaplana-Prieto, Analía Viola
31825.abstract: Spain together with Scotland are two countries that exhibit the largest expansions in long term care (LTC) in the last two decades, universalizing subsidies and supports. This paper is part of a global effort to provide a snapshot of the trends in LTC use and access, as well as the financing, and organization of the LTC system compared to other higher-income countries. The passage of Act 39/2006 on the Promotion of Personal Autonomy and Care for Dependent Persons (SAAD in Spanish) on December 14th, 2006, universalized coverage for care subsidies and supports, allowing access to care conditioned only on individuals’ assessment of care needs. As a consequence, LTC spending as a percentage of GDP has risen from 0.5% in 2003 to nearly 0.9% in 2019, despite private LTC insurance playing a minor role. Still today, LTC remains heavily reliant on informal care, which is now partially subsidized by a caregiving subsidy as part of SAAD. Long-term care spending in Spain amounts to between 1.27% (conservative estimates) and 1.70% (flexible estimation) of GDP. Finally, the system reveals significant gender imbalances in the provision of care, with women accounting for most caregivers in both formal (87%) and informal (58%) care.
31825.zh_abstract: 西班牙与苏格兰是过去二十年中长期护理（LTC）扩展幅度最大的两个国家，实现了补贴和支持的普及。本文是一项全球性努力的一部分，旨在提供长期护理使用和获取、融资及组织方面的趋势快照，并与其他高收入国家进行比较。2006年12月14日通过的《促进个人自主和照顾依赖者法》（西班牙语缩写为SAAD）普及了护理补贴和支持的覆盖范围，使得获得护理仅取决于个人护理需求的评估。因此，尽管私人长期护理保险作用甚微，长期护理支出占GDP的比重已从2003年的0.5%上升到2019年的近0.9%。时至今日，长期护理仍然严重依赖非正式护理，而作为SAAD的一部分，非正式护理现在通过护理补贴获得部分资助。西班牙的长期护理支出占GDP的比重在1.27%（保守估计）到1.70%（灵活估计）之间。最后，该体系在护理提供方面显示出显著的性别失衡，女性在正式护理（87%）和非正式护理（58%）中均占护理人员的大多数。

31824.title: Tax Policy and the Heterogeneous Costs of Homeownership
31824.zh_title: 税收政策与住房所有权的异质性成本
31824.authors: Kelly Bishop, Jakob Dowling, Nicolai V. Kuminoff, Alvin Murphy
31824.abstract: The real economic cost of homeownership depends on an intricate system of taxes and subsides that vary over time and across the United States. We incorporate the key features of this system into a framework for measuring the annual user-cost of housing and we use it to document how housing costs and subsidies varied over time, across space, and with household demographics in 2016-2017. Then we examine how the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 subsequently reduced subsidies and increased the relative cost of housing. We report how these changes varied by geography, homeownership, race, and voting behavior.
31824.zh_abstract: 住房所有权的真实经济成本取决于一个复杂的税收和补贴体系，该体系在美国各地随时间而变化。我们将该体系的关键特征纳入一个衡量住房年度使用成本的框架中，并利用该框架记录了2016-2017年间住房成本和补贴如何随时间、空间以及家庭人口特征而变化。然后，我们考察了2017年的《减税与就业法案》如何随后减少了补贴并提高了住房的相对成本。我们报告了这些变化如何因地理位置、住房所有权、种族和投票行为而异。

31823.title: Long-term care in the Netherlands
31823.authors: Pieter Bakx, Eddy Van Doorslaer, Bram Wouterse
31823.abstract: We describe the financing and use of long-term care in the Netherlands. Public long-term care insurance is universal and comprehensive; user fees are low compared to other countries. We use linked survey and administrative data to document the distribution of the need for long-term care in the 65+ population, long-term care costs and how they are paid for. The findings reveal that no other country spends more per capita on publicly financed formal care than The Netherlands. A potential reason is that the threshold to receive formal care appears to be lower in the Netherlands than in other countries. Still, a considerable share of the adult population provides informal care. Caregiving is concentrated in specific demographic groups. The costs of informal care provision are considerable, but as a share of total spending on long term care they are smaller than in most developed countries. Adding the costs of informal care to formal care expenditures changes the view on who bears the costs of long-term care.
31823.zh_abstract: 我们描述了荷兰长期护理的融资和使用情况。公共长期护理保险是普遍且全面的；与其他国家相比，用户费用较低。我们利用关联的调查和行政数据，记录了65岁以上人口中长期护理需求的分布、长期护理成本及其支付方式。研究结果显示，没有其他国家在公共资助的正式护理上的人均支出高于荷兰。一个潜在的原因是，荷兰获得正式护理的门槛似乎低于其他国家。尽管如此，仍有相当一部分成年人口提供非正式护理。护理工作集中在特定的人口群体中。提供非正式护理的成本相当可观，但作为长期护理总支出的份额，它们低于大多数发达国家。将非正式护理成本加入正式护理支出，会改变对谁承担长期护理成本的看法。

31822.title: Greater Than the Sum of Its Parts: Aggregate vs. Aggregated Inflation Expectations
31822.zh_title: 大于部分之和：总体通胀预期与加总通胀预期
31822.authors: Alexander Dietrich, Edward S. Knotek II, Kristian O. Myrseth, Robert W. Rich, Raphael Schoenle, Michael Weber
31822.abstract: This paper introduces a novel measure of consumer inflation expectations: We elicit and combine inflation forecasts across categories of personal consumption expenditure to form an aggregated measure of inflation expectations. Drawing on nearly 60,000 respondents, our data comprise the early low-inflation environment of the COVID pandemic and the 2021 inflation surge. Conventionally elicited inflation expectations consistently exceed aggregated measures constructed under plausible weighting schemes. Aggregated measures display less disagreement and volatility and are stronger predictors of consumers’ spending plans. The relative informational value of aggregated measures rises with the individual-level gap between conventional and aggregated inflation expectations. Our results chart a new course for designing measurement of inflation expectations.
31822.zh_abstract: 本文介绍了一种衡量消费者通胀预期的新方法：我们收集并整合个人消费支出各品类的通胀预测，形成一种加总的通胀预期指标。基于近6万名受访者的数据，我们的数据涵盖了新冠疫情早期的低通胀环境和2021年的通胀飙升。传统方式引发的通胀预期始终高于在合理加权方案下构建的加总指标。加总指标显示出更少的分歧和波动性，并且是消费者支出计划的更强预测指标。加总指标的相对信息价值随着个体层面传统通胀预期与加总通胀预期之间差距的扩大而上升。我们的结果为设计通胀预期的衡量方法开辟了一条新路径。

31821.title: Convergent Evolution Toward the Joint-Stock Company
31821.zh_title: 向股份公司趋同演化的路径
31821.authors: David Le Bris, William N. Goetzmann, Sébastien Pouget
31821.abstract: The origin of the modern publicly-held joint-stock company is typically traced to large-scale maritime trading companies in England and the Netherlands in the early 17th century. Highlighting medieval cases in southern Europe, we claim that the joint-stock company likely emerged in several times and places, in response to a similar set of needs and requirements for coordinating large-scale enterprises. These prior appearances support the theory of convergent evolution toward the joint-stock company. We document the different legal genealogies of the various paths, their independence and their socio-economic contexts. These observations have implications for identifying the necessary legal and political background underlying the emergence of the joint-stock company, and for the debate regarding the link between institutions and economic development.
31821.zh_abstract: 现代公众持股股份公司的起源通常追溯到17世纪早期英格兰和荷兰的大型海上贸易公司。通过强调南欧的中世纪案例，我们主张股份公司很可能在多个时期和地点出现，以应对协调大型企业时类似的一系列需求和要求。这些先前的出现支持了向股份公司趋同演化的理论。我们记录了不同路径的法律谱系、它们的独立性及其社会经济背景。这些观察对于识别股份公司出现所必需的法律和政治背景，以及关于制度与经济发展之间联系的辩论具有启示意义。

31870.title: Long-term Care in Germany
31870.authors: Johannes Geyer, Axel H. Börsch-Supan, Peter Haan, Elsa Perdrix
31870.abstract: This chapter provides an overview of the German long-term care insurance. We document care needs and wellbeing of the elderly population. Moreover, we provide a detailed description of the German long-term care institutions (sources of finance and types of benefits), the professional care work force, and informal caregivers. Finally, we document expenditures on long-term care and estimate the value of informal care. The cost of long-term care for the elderly (65+), including both cost of nursing home and home health agency, reached 61 billion euro in 2019. Half of these spending are for nursing homes while only about 22.5% of beneficiaries use these institutions. Out-of-pocket spending differs greatly between modes of care. Out-of-pocket expenditures make up only about 7% of total expenditures for home care. In nursing homes, 41% of expenditures are out-of-pocket payment. Most of the expenditures are covered by the long-term care insurance. The share of other governmental schemes in expenditures for inpatient care is relatively high. This is explained by a high rate of benefit recipients who cannot afford co-payments for nursing homes: about one-third of all nursing home residents receive means- and wealth-tested social assistance. If we add the costs of informal care the share of privately financed care amounts to nearly 60% of total expenditures.
31870.zh_abstract: 本章概述了德国的长期护理保险。我们记录了老年人口的护理需求和福祉。此外，我们详细描述了德国的长期护理制度（资金来源和福利类型）、专业护理劳动力和非正式护理人员。最后，我们记录了长期护理支出并估算了非正式护理的价值。2019年，65岁及以上老年人的长期护理成本（包括养老院和家庭护理机构成本）达到610亿欧元。其中一半支出用于养老院，但只有约22.5%的受益人使用这些机构。不同护理模式下的自付支出差异很大。自付支出仅占家庭护理总支出的约7%。在养老院中，41%的支出是自付的。大部分支出由长期护理保险覆盖。其他政府计划在住院护理支出中的份额相对较高。这可以解释为有大量福利领取者无力承担养老院的共付额：约三分之一的养老院居民接受基于收入和财富调查的社会救助。如果加上非正式护理的成本，私人资助的护理份额接近总支出的60%。

31869.title: One Says Goodbye, Another Says Hello: Turnover and Compensation in the Early Care and Education Sector
31869.zh_title: 一声告别，一声问候：早期保育与教育行业的员工流动与薪酬
31869.abstract: The quality of the early environment children experience influences their human capital development. We investigate retention and compensation in the Early Care and Education workforce by merging datasets from three different government agencies in Texas. We employ non-structural methods to compare turnover and pay in Early Care and Education with those in other sectors that employ similar workers. We estimate a dynamic discrete choice occupational model to quantify the labor supply and turnover elasticities in this industry. In addition, we simulate the impact of wage supplementation programs.
31869.zh_abstract: 儿童早期所处环境的质量影响其人力资本发展。我们通过合并德克萨斯州三个不同政府机构的数据集，研究了早期保育与教育行业的员工留任与薪酬问题。我们采用非结构性方法，将早期保育与教育行业的员工流动率和薪酬与雇佣类似工人的其他行业进行比较。我们估计了一个动态离散选择职业模型，以量化该行业的劳动力供给弹性和员工流动弹性。此外，我们还模拟了工资补贴计划的影响。

31868.title: Identification using Revealed Preferences in Linearly Separable Models
31868.zh_title: 利用线性可分模型中的显示偏好进行识别
31868.authors: Nikhil Agarwal, Pearl Z. Li, Paulo J. Somaini
31868.abstract: Revealed preference arguments are commonly used when identifying models of both single-agent decisions and non-cooperative games. We develop general identification results for a large class of models that have a linearly separable payoff structure. Our model allows for both discrete and continuous choice sets. It incorporates widely studied models such as discrete and hedonic choice models, auctions, school choice mechanisms, oligopoly pricing and trading games. We characterize the identified set and show that point identification can be achieved either if the choice set is sufficiently rich or if a variable that shifts preferences is available. Our identification results also suggests an estimation approach. Finally, we implement this approach to estimate values in a combinatorial procurement auction for school lunches in Chile.
31868.zh_abstract: 显示偏好论证常用于识别单主体决策模型和非合作博弈模型。我们为一类具有线性可分收益结构的大类模型开发了通用的识别结果。我们的模型允许离散和连续的选择集。它涵盖了广泛研究的模型，如离散选择模型、享乐选择模型、拍卖、学校选择机制、寡头定价和交易博弈。我们刻画了识别集，并表明如果选择集足够丰富，或者存在一个改变偏好的变量，则可以实现点识别。我们的识别结果也提出了一种估计方法。最后，我们应用该方法来估计智利学校午餐组合采购拍卖中的价值。

31867.title: The Impact of Right-to-Work Laws on Long Hours and Work Schedules
31867.zh_title: 工作权利法对长时间工作和工作安排的影响
31867.authors: Rania Gihleb, Osea Giuntella, Jian Qi Tan
31867.abstract: Unions play a crucial role in determining wages and employment outcomes. However, union bargaining power may also have important effects on non-pecuniary working conditions. We study the effects of right-to-work laws, which removed agency shop protection and weakened union powers on long hours and non-standard work schedules that may adversely affect workers' health and safety. We exploit variation in the timing of enactment across US states and compare workers in bordering counties across adopting states and states that did not adopt the laws yet. Using the stacked approach to difference-in-differences estimates proposed by Cengiz et al. (2019), we find evidence that right-to-work laws increased the share of workers working long hours by 6%, while there is little evidence of an impact on hourly wages. The effects on long hours are larger in more unionized sectors (i.e. construction, manufacturing, and transportation). While the likelihood of working non-standard hours increases for particular sectors (education and public administration), there is no evidence of a significant increase in the overall sample.
31867.zh_abstract: 工会在决定工资和就业结果方面发挥着关键作用。然而，工会的议价能力也可能对非金钱性的工作条件产生重要影响。我们研究了工作权利法的影响，这些法律取消了代理商店保护并削弱了工会权力，对可能损害工人健康与安全的长时间工作和非标准工作安排产生影响。我们利用美国各州颁布时间的变化，比较了采用该法律的州与尚未采用该法律的州之间边界县的工人。使用Cengiz等人（2019）提出的堆叠双重差分估计方法，我们发现证据表明，工作权利法使长时间工作工人的比例增加了6%，而对小时工资几乎没有影响。在工会化程度较高的行业（即建筑业、制造业和交通运输业），对长时间工作的影响更大。虽然特定行业（教育和公共管理）非标准工作时间工作的可能性增加，但在整体样本中没有证据表明显著增加。

31866.title: Job Transitions and Employee Earnings After Acquisitions: Linking Corporate and Worker Outcomes
31866.zh_title: 并购后的工作转换与员工收入：连接企业与工人结果
31866.authors: David Arnold, Kevin S. Milligan, Terry Moon, Amirhossein Tavakoli
31866.abstract: This paper connects changes in employer characteristics through job transitions to employee earnings following mergers and acquisitions (M&As). Using firm balance sheet data linked to individual earnings data in Canada and a matched difference-in-differences design, we find that after M&As acquirers expand while targets shrink substantially relative to their matched control groups. Additionally, profit margins decrease for both acquirers and targets in the medium run. Furthermore, workers at target firms suffer losses in earnings, and this decline in earnings is entirely driven by workers who move to other firms after an M&A event. We find that workers leaving target firms after M&As move to larger firms with higher wage premiums, but with much worse match qualities on average. Taken together, it appears that job transitions to employers with poor match qualities primarily explain the post-M&A decline in worker earnings in our setting.
31866.zh_abstract: 本文通过工作转换将雇主特征的变化与并购后员工的收入联系起来。利用加拿大企业资产负债表数据与个人收入数据，并采用匹配的双重差分设计，我们发现，并购后，收购方相对于其匹配对照组扩张，而目标公司则大幅收缩。此外，在中期内，收购方和目标公司的利润率均有所下降。进一步地，目标公司的工人遭受收入损失，而这种收入下降完全是由并购事件后跳槽到其他公司的工人所驱动的。我们发现，并购后离开目标公司的工人跳槽到了工资溢价更高但平均匹配质量差得多的大型企业。综合来看，在我们的设定中，跳槽到匹配质量差的雇主似乎主要解释了并购后工人收入的下降。

31865.title: The Deposit Business at Large vs. Small Banks
31865.zh_title: 大银行与小银行的存款业务
31865.authors: Adrien d'Avernas, Andrea L. Eisfeldt, Can Huang, Richard Stanton, Nancy Wallace
31865.abstract: The deposit business differs at large versus small banks. We provide a parsimonious model and extensive empirical evidence supporting the idea that much of the variation in deposit-pricing behavior between large and small banks reflects differences in preferences and technologies. Large banks offer superior liquidity services but lower deposit rates, and locate where customers value their services. In addition to receiving a lower level of deposit rates on average, customers of large banks also exhibit lower rate elasticities. As a result, despite the fact that the locations of large-bank branches have demographics typically associated with greater financial sophistication, large-bank customers earn lower average deposit rates. Our explanation for deposit pricing behavior challenges the idea that deposit pricing is mainly driven by pricing power derived from the large observed degree of concentration in the banking industry.
31865.zh_abstract: 大银行与小银行的存款业务存在差异。我们提供了一个简洁的模型和广泛的实证证据，支持这样一种观点：大银行和小银行之间存款定价行为的许多差异反映了偏好和技术的不同。大银行提供更优越的流动性服务，但存款利率较低，并且位于客户看重其服务的地点。除了平均获得的存款利率水平较低外，大银行的客户还表现出较低的利率弹性。因此，尽管大银行分支机构的所在地通常具有与更高金融素养相关的人口统计特征，但大银行的客户获得的平均存款利率却较低。我们对存款定价行为的解释挑战了这样一种观点，即存款定价主要由银行业观察到的巨大集中度所带来的定价权驱动。
31865.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：E0, E40, E44, G0, G2, G21, G28

31864.title: Financial Windfalls, Portfolio Allocations, and Risk Preferences
31864.zh_title: 意外之财、资产配置与风险偏好
31864.authors: Joseph S. Briggs, David Cesarini, Sean Chanwook Lee, Erik Lindqvist, Robert Östling
31864.abstract: We investigate the impact of financial windfalls on household portfolio choices and risk exposure. Exploiting the randomized assignment of lottery prizes in three Swedish lotteries, we find a windfall gain of $\$100$K leads to a 5-percentage-point decrease in the risky share of household portfolios. We show theoretically that negative wealth effects are consistent with both constant and decreasing relative risk aversion and analyze how our empirical estimates help distinguish between competing models of portfolio choice. We further show our results are quantitatively aligned with the predictions of a calibrated dynamic portfolio choice model with nontradable human capital and consumption habits.
31864.zh_abstract: 我们研究了意外之财对家庭投资组合选择和风险敞口的影响。利用瑞典三种彩票中奖的随机分配，我们发现10万美元的意外之财导致家庭投资组合中风险资产份额下降5个百分点。我们从理论上证明，负财富效应与常数相对风险厌恶和递减相对风险厌恶都是一致的，并分析了我们的实证估计如何帮助区分竞争性的投资组合选择模型。我们进一步表明，我们的结果与一个包含不可交易人力资本和消费习惯的校准动态投资组合选择模型的预测在数量上一致。

31863.title: When do Treasuries Earn the Convenience Yield? — A Hedging Perspective
31863.zh_title: 美国国债何时获得便利收益率？——一个对冲视角
31863.abstract: We document that the convenience yield of U.S. Treasuries exhibits properties that are consistent with a hedging perspective of safe assets. The convenience yield tends to be low when the covariance of Treasury returns with the aggregate stock market returns is high. A decomposition of the aggregate stock-bond covariance into terms corresponding to the convenience yield, the frictionless risk-free rate, and default risk reveals that the covariance between stock returns and the convenience yield itself drives the effect in a substantive capacity. We show the convenience yield is reduced with heightened inflation expectations that erode the hedging properties of U.S. Treasuries and other fixed-income money-like assets, inducing a switch to alternatives such as gold; it is also reduced immediately prior to debt-ceiling standoffs and with increases in Treasury supply.
31863.zh_abstract: 我们记录了美国国债的便利收益率表现出与安全资产对冲视角一致的特征。当国债收益率与股票市场总收益率的协方差较高时，便利收益率往往较低。将股票-债券总协方差分解为对应于便利收益率、无摩擦无风险利率和违约风险的项，表明股票收益率与便利收益率本身之间的协方差在很大程度上驱动了这一效应。我们表明，通胀预期上升会侵蚀美国国债和其他固定收益类货币型资产的对冲属性，导致转向黄金等替代品，从而降低便利收益率；在债务上限僵局之前以及国债供应增加时，便利收益率也会降低。
31863.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, E5, F3, G11, G12, G15

31862.title: Are Swedish House Prices Too High? Why the Price-to-Income Ratio Is a Misleading Indicator
31862.zh_title: 瑞典房价过高吗？为什么房价收入比是一个误导性指标
31862.abstract:
Appropriate indicators of housing valuation are important for macroprudential policy and assessments of risks to financial stability. Overvalued housing may result in a correction and a fall in house prices, which if large could threaten financial and macroeconomic stability. 
According to ECB (2023) and European Systemic Risk Board (2022), Swedish owner-occupied housing (OOH) was overvalued by about 55% in 2021q2, the largest overvaluation in the EU and EEA; according to European Commission (2023c), by about 30% in 2022. These assessments affect warnings and recommendations issued for Swedish economic policy and the shocks in EBA stress tests of Swedish banks. 
But these assessments are due to the use of misleading indicators: the deviations of price-to-income (PTI) and price-to-rent ratios from their historical averages. They disregard mortgage rates and other housing costs and lack scientific support. According to a large housing literature, it is not the purchase price but the user cost that is the appropriate measure of the cost of living in OOH, the cost of the housing services that the OOH delivers. From this point of view, “Are house prices too high?” is the wrong question. The right question is, “Are user costs too high?” 
New improved estimates of an upper bound of the user cost are constructed, including an adjustment for a preference shift during the coronavirus crisis in favor of larger and better housing. The upper bound results from a conservative lower bound on house-price expectations below the few existing data points—regular time-series expectations data are not available. 
According to the user-cost-to-income (UCTI) ratio, Swedish owner-occupied houses have since 2010 instead become increasingly undervalued (not overvalued), by about 30% in 2019q4. Due to higher mortgage rates, they are less undervalued in 2025q1, but still about 25%. 
For Sweden, the UCTI and PTI indicators are in fact strongly negatively correlated, with opposite signs. If the UCTI indicator is the right one, the PTI indicator is consistently wrong. 
The valuation assessments of the ECB, the ESRB, the Commission, the OECD, and the IMF are scrutinized and compared. The problem of misleading indicators and overvaluation assessments—and resulting distorted warnings and recommendations—is not restricted to Sweden but concerns several other countries in the European Union.
31862.zh_abstract: 适当的住房估值指标对于宏观审慎政策和金融稳定风险评估至关重要。估值过高的住房可能导致价格回调，如果幅度过大，可能威胁金融和宏观经济稳定。根据欧洲央行（2023）和欧洲系统性风险委员会（2022）的数据，2021年第二季度瑞典自住住房估值过高约55%，为欧盟和欧洲经济区最高；根据欧盟委员会（2023c）的数据，2022年估值过高约30%。这些评估影响了针对瑞典经济政策发出的警告和建议，以及欧洲银行管理局对瑞典银行压力测试中的冲击。但这些评估是由于使用了误导性指标：房价收入比和房价租金比与其历史均值的偏离。它们忽略了抵押贷款利率和其他住房成本，缺乏科学依据。根据大量住房文献，衡量自住住房居住成本（即自住住房提供的住房服务成本）的适当指标不是购买价格，而是使用者成本。从这个角度看，“房价过高吗？”是一个错误的问题。正确的问题是，“使用者成本过高吗？”我们构建了使用者成本上限的新改进估计，包括对新冠疫情期间偏好转向更大更好住房的调整。该上限源于对房价预期的保守下限估计，该下限低于现有的少数数据点——常规的时间序列预期数据不可得。根据使用者成本收入比，自2010年以来，瑞典自住住房反而变得越来越被低估（而非高估），2019年第四季度被低估约30%。由于抵押贷款利率上升，2025年第一季度被低估程度有所减轻，但仍约为25%。对于瑞典而言，使用者成本收入比和房价收入比指标实际上呈强烈负相关，符号相反。如果使用者成本收入比指标是正确的，那么房价收入比指标就一直是错误的。我们对欧洲央行、欧洲系统性风险委员会、欧盟委员会、经合组织和国际货币基金组织的估值评估进行了详细审查和比较。误导性指标和高估评估的问题——以及由此产生的扭曲警告和建议——并不仅限于瑞典，还涉及欧盟其他几个国家。
31862.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, G21, G50, R21, R30, R31

31861.title: Long-term Care in Italy
31861.authors: Agar Brugiavini, Ludovico Carrino, Giacomo Pasini
31861.abstract: The provision of long-term care (LTC) for senior citizens in Italy is at the center of the recent policy debate. Italy has witnessed a spectacular increase in the share of people aged 65 and over and in particular of people aged 80 and over, which could translate in large increases in the number of people in need of care. We show that individuals who are in need of LTC have lower economic resources than the average, so that many frail older people have little financial means to pay out-of-pocket for formal care. In fact, publicly provided care is highly fragmented, with stark differences emerging in terms of coverage and generosity across Italian regions. Hence, the supply of LTC is relying heavily on the informal support of members of the family, especially women, at the same time formal care is characterised by a significant underground economy of unskilled carers.
31861.zh_abstract: 意大利老年公民长期护理（LTC）的提供是近期政策辩论的核心。意大利65岁及以上人口比例，特别是80岁及以上人口比例显著增长，这可能导致需要护理的人数大幅增加。我们表明，需要长期护理的个人平均经济资源低于一般水平，因此许多体弱老年人几乎没有财力自费支付正式护理。事实上，公共提供的护理高度分散，意大利各地区在覆盖范围和慷慨程度上存在显著差异。因此，长期护理的供应严重依赖家庭成员（尤其是女性）的非正式支持，同时正式护理的特点是存在大量非熟练护理人员的影子经济。

31860.title: Trade Uncertainty and U.S. Bank Lending
31860.zh_title: 贸易不确定性与美国银行贷款
31860.authors: Ricardo Correa, Julian di Giovanni, Linda S. Goldberg, Camelia Minoiu
31860.abstract: This paper uses U.S. credit register data and the 2018–2019 Trade War to study the effects of uncertainty on domestic credit supply. Exploiting differences in banks’ ex-ante exposure to trade uncertainty, we find that increased uncertainty is associated with a broad lending contraction across their customer firms. This result is consistent with banks responding to uncertainty with wait-and-see behaviors, where more exposed banks curtail risky exposures, reduce loan maturities, and adjust loan supply along both intensive and extensive margins. The lending contraction is larger for more capital-constrained banks and has significant real effects, especially for bank-dependent firms.
31860.zh_abstract: 本文利用美国信贷登记数据和2018-2019年贸易战，研究不确定性对国内信贷供给的影响。通过利用银行事前对贸易不确定性的暴露差异，我们发现不确定性增加与其客户企业的广泛贷款收缩相关。这一结果与银行采取观望行为应对不确定性相一致，其中暴露程度更高的银行削减风险敞口、缩短贷款期限，并在集约边际和广延边际上调整贷款供给。贷款收缩在资本约束更强的银行中更为显著，并产生显著的实际效应，尤其对依赖银行的企业影响更大。
31860.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：F34, F42, G21

31859.title: What Drives Booms and Busts in Value?
31859.zh_title: 价值投资繁荣与衰退的驱动因素
31859.authors: John Y. Campbell, Stefano Giglio, Christopher Polk
31859.abstract: Value investing delivers volatile returns, with large drawdowns during both market booms and busts. This paper interprets these returns through an intertemporal CAPM, which predicts that aggregate cash flow, discount rate, and volatility news all move value returns. We document that indeed these shocks explain a large fraction of quarterly value returns over the last 60 years. We also distinguish between the intra-industry and inter-industry components of value, showing that the ICAPM explains the former better. Finally, we develop a novel methodology to perform this decomposition at the daily frequency, using it to interpret value returns during the Covid-19 pandemic.
31859.zh_abstract: 价值投资回报波动剧烈，在市场繁荣和衰退期间均出现大幅回撤。本文通过跨期资本资产定价模型（ICAPM）解释这些回报，该模型预测总现金流、贴现率和波动率新闻都会影响价值回报。我们证明，在过去60年中，这些冲击确实解释了季度价值回报的很大一部分。我们还区分了价值投资的行业内和行业间成分，表明ICAPM能更好地解释前者。最后，我们开发了一种新方法，以日度频率进行这种分解，并利用它来解释新冠疫情期间的价值回报。

31858.title: The Long-run Effect of Air Pollution on Survival
31858.zh_title: 空气污染对生存率的长期影响
31858.abstract: Many environmental hazards produce health effects that take years to arise, but quasi-experimental studies typically measure outcomes and treatment over short time periods. We develop a new approach to overcome this challenge and use it to gauge the effect of exposure to air pollution on US life expectancy. Using changes in wind direction as an instrument for daily sulfur dioxide levels, we first characterize the short-run mortality effects of acute exposure during the time period 1972-1988.
